text: The world feels disjointed and tilted as I look around this dimly-lit, perhaps deserted building. The silence is heavy; the cold glass and the harsh wall lights amplify the feeling of isolation. I am uncertain whether to feel anticipation or unease. My mind grapples with the emptiness, searching for meaning in shadows and reflections. In such sterile places, I find myself reflecting on the boundaries between the known and the unknown, comfort and discomfort, purpose and aimlessness.
